captureSemantics.phoneElement: The mock device element itself; expected outer dimensions are 390x844 at the authoring width.
captureSemantics.scenarioPng: A locator screenshot of the complete scenario article, including its label and the phone element; its PNG dimensions are therefore larger than 390x844.
captureSemantics.keyboardIllustration: Static CSS illustrations only; not an operating-system keyboard, browser keyboard, or runtime focus/viewport test.

atlasActionSamples.classification: Static visual/copy samples only; excluded from actionable-target acceptance unless made semantic or explicitly actionable.

staticKeyboardIllustrations.classification: Static CSS illustrations only; not an operating-system keyboard, browser keyboard, or runtime focus/viewport test.

contrast.standard: WCAG AA normal-text contrast for the scoped token/background pairs listed here.
